case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. CRISTOPHER BARRETO ZAMUDIO

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.40 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, CRISTOPHER BARRETO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
